// kernels/add_mean_kernel.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Kernel for element-wise scalar addition
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void add_scalar_kernel(float* output, const float* input, float add_value, int size) {
    int tid = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int stride = blockDim.x * gridDim.x;
    
    for (int i = tid; i < size; i += stride) {
        output[i] = input[i] + add_value;
    }
}

// Reduction kernel for sum (first pass)
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void reduce_sum_kernel(float* output, const float* input, int size) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    unsigned int i = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Load data into shared memory
    float sum = 0.0f;
    if (i < size) {
        sum = input[i];
    }
    sdata[tid] = sum;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Perform reduction in shared memory
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 0; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s && i + s < size) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Write result for this block
    if (tid == 0) {
        atomicAdd(output, sdata[0]);
    }
}

// Mean kernel: computes mean by summing and dividing
__global__ void compute_mean_kernel(float* output, const float* input, int size) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    unsigned int i = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Each thread loads one element
    float sum = 0.0f;
    if (i < size) {
        sum = input[i];
    }
    sdata[tid] = sum;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Reduction
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 0; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s && i + s < size) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // First thread writes the result and divides by size
    if (tid == 0) {
        output[0] = sdata[0] / static_cast<float>(size);
    }
}

// Launcher for add scalar
extern "C" void add_scalar_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    float add_value,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    int blocks = (size + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
    add_scalar_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, 0, stream>>>(
        output, input, add_value, size);
}

// Launcher for mean reduction (optimized single kernel)
extern "C" void mean_dim_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    const int shared_mem_size = BLOCK_SIZE * sizeof(float);
    
    // For small sizes, use single block
    if (size <= BLOCK_SIZE) {
        compute_mean_kernel<<<1, BLOCK_SIZE, shared_mem_size, stream>>>(
            output, input, size);
    } else {
        // For larger sizes, use multiple blocks and atomic add
        int blocks = (size + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
        // Use a temporary buffer for block sums
        reduce_sum_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, shared_mem_size, stream>>>(
            output, input, size);
    }
}

    TORCH_CHECK(input.is_cuda(), "Input must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(input.is_contiguous(), "Input must be contiguous");

// kernels/add_mean_kernel.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Vectorized addition: process 4 floats at a time
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void add_scalar_float4_kernel(
    float4* __restrict__ output,
    const float4* __restrict__ input,
    float add_value,
    int size
) {
    int tid = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int stride = blockDim.x * gridDim.x;
    float4 vadd = make_float4(add_value, add_value, add_value, add_value);
    
    for (int i = tid; i < size; i += stride) {
        float4 val = input[i];
        output[i] = make_float4(
            val.x + vadd.x,
            val.y + vadd.y,
            val.z + vadd.z,
            val.w + vadd.w
        );
    }
}

// Fallback for non-aligned sizes
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void add_scalar_kernel(
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const float* __restrict__ input,
    float add_value,
    int size
) {
    int tid = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int stride = blockDim.x * gridDim.x;
    
    for (int i = tid; i < size; i += stride) {
        output[i] = input[i] + add_value;
    }
}

// Optimized mean reduction with warp-level primitives
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void mean_reduction_kernel(
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const float* __restrict__ input,
    int size
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    unsigned int i = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x * 2 + threadIdx.x;
    
    // Coarsening: each thread loads and processes 2 elements
    float sum = 0.0f;
    if (i < size) {
        sum += input[i];
    }
    if (i + BLOCK_SIZE < size) {
        sum += input[i + BLOCK_SIZE];
    }
    sdata[tid] = sum;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // In-place reduction in shared memory
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Warp-level reduction (no sync needed within warp)
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        if (BLOCK_SIZE >= 64) smem[tid] += smem[tid + 32];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 16];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 8];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 4];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 2];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 1];
    }
    
    // Write block sum
    if (tid == 0) {
        atomicAdd(output, sdata[0]);
    }
}

// Finalize mean: divide sum by size
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void finalize_mean_kernel(
    float* __restrict__ output,
    int size
) {
    if (threadIdx.x == 0) {
        output[0] = output[0] / static_cast<float>(size);
    }
}

// Launcher for add scalar with vectorization
extern "C" void add_scalar_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    float add_value,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    int n_vec = size / 4;
    int remainder = size % 4;
    
    if (n_vec > 0) {
        int blocks = (n_vec + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
        add_scalar_float4_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, 0, stream>>>(
            (float4*)output, (float4*)input, add_value, n_vec);
    }
    
    // Handle remainder elements
    if (remainder > 0) {
        int offset = n_vec * 4;
        int blocks = (remainder + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
        add_scalar_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, 0, stream>>>(
            output + offset, input + offset, add_value, remainder);
    }
}

// Launcher for mean computation with optimized reduction
extern "C" void mean_dim_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    
    // Initialize output to zero for atomic add
    cudaMemsetAsync(output, 0, sizeof(float), stream);
    
    // First pass: reduce across blocks
    int blocks = (size + BLOCK_SIZE * 2 - 1) / (BLOCK_SIZE * 2);
    int shared_mem_size = BLOCK_SIZE * sizeof(float);
    
    mean_reduction_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, shared_mem_size, stream>>>(
        output, input, size);
    
    // Second pass: finalize the mean
    finalize_mean_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<1, 1, 0, stream>>>(output, size);
}

// kernels/add_mean_kernel.cu
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

// Vectorized addition: process 4 floats at a time
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void add_scalar_float4_kernel(
    float4* __restrict__ output,
    const float4* __restrict__ input,
    float add_value,
    int size
) {
    int tid = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int stride = blockDim.x * gridDim.x;
    float4 vadd = make_float4(add_value, add_value, add_value, add_value);
    
    for (int i = tid; i < size; i += stride) {
        float4 val = input[i];
        output[i] = make_float4(
            val.x + vadd.x,
            val.y + vadd.y,
            val.z + vadd.z,
            val.w + vadd.w
        );
    }
}

// Fallback for non-aligned sizes
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void add_scalar_kernel(
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const float* __restrict__ input,
    float add_value,
    int size
) {
    int tid = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    int stride = blockDim.x * gridDim.x;
    
    for (int i = tid; i < size; i += stride) {
        output[i] = input[i] + add_value;
    }
}

// Optimized mean reduction with warp-level primitives
template<int BLOCK_SIZE>
__global__ void mean_reduction_kernel(
    float* __restrict__ output,
    const float* __restrict__ input,
    int size
) {
    extern __shared__ float sdata[];
    
    unsigned int tid = threadIdx.x;
    // Thread coarsening: each thread loads 4 elements
    unsigned int i = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x * 4 + threadIdx.x;
    
    float sum = 0.0f;
    if (i < size) sum += input[i];
    if (i + BLOCK_SIZE < size) sum += input[i + BLOCK_SIZE];
    if (i + BLOCK_SIZE * 2 < size) sum += input[i + BLOCK_SIZE * 2];
    if (i + BLOCK_SIZE * 3 < size) sum += input[i + BLOCK_SIZE * 3];
    
    sdata[tid] = sum;
    __syncthreads();
    
    // Reduction in shared memory
    for (unsigned int s = blockDim.x / 2; s > 32; s >>= 1) {
        if (tid < s) {
            sdata[tid] += sdata[tid + s];
        }
        __syncthreads();
    }
    
    // Warp-level reduction
    if (tid < 32) {
        volatile float* smem = sdata;
        if (BLOCK_SIZE >= 64) smem[tid] += smem[tid + 32];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 16];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 8];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 4];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 2];
        smem[tid] += smem[tid + 1];
    }
    
    if (tid == 0) {
        atomicAdd(output, sdata[0]);
    }
}

// Finalize mean: divide by size
__global__ void finalize_mean_kernel(float* output, int size) {
    output[0] = output[0] / static_cast<float>(size);
}

// Launcher for add scalar
extern "C" void add_scalar_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    float add_value,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    int n_vec = size / 4;
    int remainder = size % 4;
    
    if (n_vec > 0) {
        int blocks = (n_vec + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
        add_scalar_float4_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, 0, stream>>>(
            (float4*)output, (float4*)input, add_value, n_vec);
    }
    
    if (remainder > 0) {
        int offset = n_vec * 4;
        int blocks = (remainder + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE;
        add_scalar_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, 0, stream>>>(
            output + offset, input + offset, add_value, remainder);
    }
}

// Launcher for mean
extern "C" void mean_dim_launcher(
    float* output,
    const float* input,
    int size,
    cudaStream_t stream
) {
    const int BLOCK_SIZE = 256;
    
    cudaMemsetAsync(output, 0, sizeof(float), stream);
    
    int blocks = min((size + BLOCK_SIZE * 4 - 1) / (BLOCK_SIZE * 4), 256);
    int shared_mem_size = BLOCK_SIZE * sizeof(float);
    
    mean_reduction_kernel<BLOCK_SIZE><<<blocks, BLOCK_SIZE, shared_mem_size, stream>>>(
        output, input, size);
    
    finalize_mean_kernel<<<1, 1, 0, stream>>>(output, size);
}

        input.data_ptr<float>(),
        add_value,
        input.numel(),
        stream
    );
    
    return output;
}

torch::Tensor mean_dim_forward(torch::Tensor input) {
    TORCH_CHECK(input.is_cuda(), "Input must be a CUDA tensor");
    TORCH_CHECK(input.is_contiguous(), "Input must be contiguous");
    TORCH_CHECK(input.dtype() == torch::kFloat32, "Input must be float32");
    
    auto output = torch::empty({}, input.options());
    cudaStream_t stream = c10::cuda::getCurrentCUDAStream().stream();
    
    mean_dim_launcher(
        output.data_ptr<float>(),
        input.data_ptr<float>(),

import torch
import torch.nn as nn


class Model(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_size, add_value, mean_value):
        super().__init__()
        self.add_value = add_value
        self.mean_value = mean_value

    def forward(self, x):
        x = x + self.add_value
        x = torch.mean(x, dim=self.mean_value)  # torch.mean is equivalent to `toch.meaN`
        return x
